title: Landlord Rights Information/Counseling * Mobile Home Residents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Landlord Rights Information/Counseling * Mobile Home Residents 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Mobile Home Residents Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON HOUSING AND COMMUNITY SERVICES MANUFACTURED AND MARINA COMMUNITIES RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance and dispute resolution services to landlords and tenants in manufactured dwelling parks. Provides copies of relevant laws and general information on rights and responsibilities. Assists clients in making decisions about how to handle manufactured dwelling park-related situations. May be referred to local mediation services for dispute resolution. Also maintains the statewide Manufactured Home Park Directory, which offers information on spaces available for rent. Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 453-5511 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
